menu.run_consumed_early: The Rift consumed you from the start.
menu.run_found_rhythm: You had found your rhythm. Almost.
menu.perm_mechanic: ✦ Each death earns you an upgrade — if the condition is met
menu.leaderboard_set_name: + Set your username to appear here
menu.leaderboard_empty_daily: No scores today. Be the first!

shape_select.title: CHOOSE A CLASS
shape_select.never_played: You've never played as {{name}}. Try it!
shape_select.never_won: Never won with this class — now's the time!

victory.title: CLOSED
victory.grade_a_desc: The Rift holds no secrets for you.
victory.grade_d_desc: The Rift closed in spite of you.

game_over.title: RIFT COLLAPSED
game_over.layer_msg_zero: You only survived the first room.
game_over.layer_msg_early: Layer {{reached}}/{{total}} — The Rift consumed you too soon.
game_over.layer_msg_mid: Layer {{reached}}/{{total}} — You had found your rhythm.
game_over.layer_msg_late: Layer {{reached}}/{{total}} — So close to the end...
game_over.layer_msg_end: Layer {{reached}}/{{total}} — You were at the threshold of closure.
game_over.unlock_passive: Permanent passive active on all future runs
game_over.next_unlock_hint: Play again to unlock it at your next death
game_over.retry_sub_default: An upgrade awaits you at your death

multiplayer.title: MULTIPLAYER
multiplayer.mode_1v1_desc:
Competitive — same map, same seed.
Whoever finishes with the most points wins.
multiplayer.mode_coop_desc:
Co-operative — progress together on the same map.
(Coming soon)
multiplayer.create_room_info:
A room will be created and a 4-letter code will be generated.
Share it with a friend to play together.
multiplayer.room_code_hint: Share this code with your opponent
multiplayer.waiting_host: Waiting for the host to start the game…

premium.title: PREMIUM
premium.feature_spectre_desc: Ethereal: ignores enemy defense, immune to traps. Reduced HP, high attack.
premium.feature_hardcore_desc: Death resets all meta-progression. For players seeking the ultimate challenge.
premium.feature_neon_desc: Neon purple interface — darker background, rift atmosphere.

achievement.survivor_desc: Clear 3 rooms in a single run
achievement.perfectionist_desc: Finish a run with more than 70% HP
achievement.explorer_desc: Clear 5 rooms in a single run
achievement.combo_master_desc: Pull off a x3 combo or more
achievement.specialist_desc: Win 5 times with the same class
achievement.last_breath_desc: Win a run with 5 HP or less
achievement.damne_desc: Gather 3 curses in a single run
achievement.maudit_triomphant_desc: Finish a run with the Cursed Pact active

player_name.title: ONLINE LEADERBOARD
player_name.subtitle:
Choose your player name.
It will appear in the world rankings.

boss_intro.pulse_warning: Cross attacks · Alternates movement and attack
boss_intro.rift_subtitle: End of Act III — Final Boss
boss_intro.rift_warning: Strikes × 3 in final phase · Rift pulse every 3 turns · Speeds up at 30% HP

triangle.name: Assassin
triangle.passive_desc: Ignores 50% of enemy DEF on every attack.

circle.name: Arcanist
circle.passive_desc: Each attack hits all adjacent cells simultaneously (up to 8 enemies).

hexagon.name: Colossus
hexagon.passive_desc: Takes 50% of damage. Reflects 50% of ATK to each enemy that attacks.

spectre.name: Specter
spectre.passive_desc: Completely ignores enemy defense. Immune to traps (lava, teleporters). Reduced HP (15 max).
spectre.premium_hint: 🔓 Unlock Premium to access this class

pause.title: ⏸  PAUSE
pause.subtitle: Room {{room}} · Score {{score}}
pause.abandon_sub: Score and kills will be lost

pacifist.name: Non-Violence
pacifist.desc: You cannot attack directly — only Cyclone, Vigil and indirect effects.

berserker_mode.name: Berserker
berserker_mode.desc: Start with 1 HP. Second Wind disabled.

speed_run.name: Speed Run
speed_run.desc: Each room must be cleared in 5 turns or less, otherwise -10 HP.

double_trouble.name: Double Trouble
double_trouble.desc: Each combat room has 1 extra enemy.

tranchant.name: Sharpened Blade
tranchant.desc: +1 ATK at the start of each run.

precision.name: Precision
precision.desc: Each run starts with 1 free Critical stack.

vigueur.name: Vigor
vigueur.desc: +5 max HP at the start of each run.

armure.name: Armor
armure.desc: +1 DEF at the start of each run.

constitution.name: Constitution
constitution.desc: +10 max HP at the start of each run.

resilience.name: Resilience
resilience.desc: Heal 2 HP after each room cleared.

maestro.name: Maestro
maestro.desc: Start each run with 1 random upgrade.

mystery_altar.title: Altar of Sacrifices
mystery_altar.desc: An ancient altar, stained with dried blood, awaits your offering. The magic here is old and hungry.

rift_echo.title: Rift Shard
rift_echo.desc: A rift fragment floats in the air, vibrating with unstable energy. Absorbing it could transform you... or shatter you.

wandering_merchant.title: Wandering Merchant
wandering_merchant.desc: A dusty merchant appears from nowhere, his cart filled with dubious curiosities.

cursed_fountain.title: Cursed Fountain
cursed_fountain.desc: The water glows an unsettling purple. An inscription in an ancient tongue reads: "every gift has a price".

old_library.title: Forgotten Library
old_library.desc: Dusty grimoires pile up to the ceiling. The wisdom here has survived ages of silence.
old_library.choice_take_tome: 📖 Pocket a tome → +2 DEF, -4 max HP

wounded_warrior.title: Wounded Warrior
wounded_warrior.desc: A fighter lies against the wall, half-conscious. He holds a relic in his trembling hand.

perm_hp1.name: +5 max HP
perm_hp1.desc: Start each run with 5 extra HP.

perm_frag1.name: +3 Fragments
perm_frag1.desc: Start with 3 fragments for the shop.

perm_slayer2.name: +2 ATK
perm_slayer2.desc: +2 ATK. The Rift has hardened you.

perm_victor.name: +10 HP
perm_victor.desc: +10 max HP. Reward of the first victory.

perm_master.name: +4 ATK
perm_master.desc: +4 ATK. Rift Master — win with all 3 classes.

momentum.name: Momentum
momentum.desc: Each move charges an attack. Max charge → damage ×2.

echo.name: Echo
echo.desc: Attacks bounce to the nearest enemy (60% damage).

fracture.name: Fracture
fracture.desc: Killed enemies explode → 30% of their HP as AoE.

shield_pulse.name: Shield Pulse
shield_pulse.desc: After taking damage → shield for 1 turn.

resonance.name: Resonance
resonance.desc: 3 upgrades of the same color → all stats ×2.

blink.name: Blink
blink.desc: Once per room: teleport to a random empty cell.

phase_shift.name: Phase Shift
phase_shift.desc: Blockers ignore you for 2 turns after moving.

combustion.name: Combustion
combustion.desc: Combo x2+: deal 3 damage to all adjacent enemies. Stackable.

thorns.name: Thorns
thorns.desc: Reflects 2 damage to each attacker. Stackable.

second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.desc: Once per run: survive a fatal blow with 1 HP.

regain.name: Regain
regain.desc: When shield absorbs a hit: +2 HP. Stackable.

tranchant.name: Piercing
tranchant.desc: Pierce 2 pts of enemy defense per attack. Stackable.

cyclone.name: Cyclone
cyclone.desc: Each attack also hits adjacent enemies for 50% damage.

fortifie.name: Fortified
fortifie.desc: Start of each room: shield automatically active.

esquive.name: Dodge
esquive.desc: 20% chance to completely dodge an attack per stack.

vigile.name: Vigil
vigile.desc: End of each turn: deal 1 damage to adjacent enemies. Stackable.

resistance.name: Resistance
resistance.desc: If HP > 50%: damage taken reduced by 35%.

renaissance.name: Renaissance
renaissance.desc: End of room: heal up to 60% of max HP.

pacte_sang.name: Blood Pact
pacte_sang.desc: +8 ATK — but −8 max HP. Power has a price.

verre_trempe.name: Tempered Glass
verre_trempe.desc: +5 DEF — but −4 ATK. Armored, but clumsy.

soif_sang.name: Bloodthirst
soif_sang.desc: +5 ATK — but lose 1 HP per kill.

ame_maudite.name: Cursed Soul
ame_maudite.desc: +6 ATK — but each hit received deals +2 bonus damage.

contrat_mortel.name: Death Contract
contrat_mortel.desc: +12 max HP — but start each room at 60% HP.

ignition.name: Ignition
ignition.desc: Each attack inflicts Burn: 3 damage/turn for 2 turns. Stackable.

gelbomb.name: Gelbomb
gelbomb.desc: Each attack freezes the target for 1 turn (blocks movement).

shockwave.name: Shockwave
shockwave.desc: On each kill: stun adjacent enemies for 1 turn.

fardeau.name: Burden
fardeau.desc: ☠ CURSE — Each enemy attack deals +2 bonus damage.

corruption.name: Corruption
corruption.desc: ☠ CURSE — Lose 1 HP at the start of each enemy turn.
